hintDisplay: Sujeto: Ellos / Verbo: Haber (auxiliar para pluscuamperfecto) / Verbo: Explorar/Navegar (acción principal) / Complemento: La tienda / Tiempo: Durante una hora / Verbo: Decidir (acción posterior) / Complemento: Hacer su compra
spanishSentence: Ellos habían estado explorando la tienda durante una hora antes de decidirse a hacer su compra.
correctSentence: They had browsed through the store for an hour before they decided to make their purchase.

correctSentence: My friend had spent all her money before she realized she forgot to buy shoes.

correctSentence: I had not spent all my money before I left the shopping mall.

correctSentence: I had wrapped the gift before the customer arrived at the store.

correctSentence: We had not compared the prices before we made our purchase.

hints: Verbo: Buscar (pasado perfecto - acción iniciada en el pasado y continuada hasta otro momento)
hintDisplay: Sujeto: Yo / Verbo: Buscar (pasado perfecto - acción iniciada en el pasado y continuada hasta otro momento) / Complemento: Esa camisa / Tiempo: Durante meses / Verbo: Encontrar (pasado simple - acción completada) / Complemento: En la tienda / Marcador temporal: Finalmente
spanishSentence: Había estado buscando esa camisa durante meses antes de finalmente encontrarla en la tienda.
correctSentence: I had looked for that shirt for months before I finally found it at the store.

correctSentence: By the time the customers arrived, the store manager had organized all the merchandise on the shelves.

correctSentence: I had already scanned all the items before the customer realized he forgot his wallet.

hints: Tiempo: Para cuando (indica un momento específico en el pasado)

hintDisplay: Tiempo: Para cuando (indica un momento específico en el pasado) / Sujeto: Tú (segunda persona singular) / Verbo: Llegar (acción que ocurre en segundo plano) / Complemento: A la tienda (lugar) / Sujeto: Yo (primera persona singular) / Verbo: Haber (auxiliar para pluscuamperfecto) / Verbo: Asistir (acción completada antes del momento anterior) / Complemento: A tres clientes (objeto indirecto) / Complemento: Con sus compras (complemento de modo)

correctSentence: By the time you arrived at the store, I had already assisted three customers with their purchases.
